collection_name: Condensed Matter Physics - Experimental Datasets with Open Data
revision_notes: v2: P01 author list corrected against arXiv preprint (co-first authors are L. Chen and A. X. Wu; Tulu is third, not co-first).

v2: All 20 paper PDFs were re-scanned end-to-end (body + references) for Zenodo/figshare citations, not just the Data Availability section, per reviewer guidance. New evidence added to P08, P14, P16; negative scans documented for P01 and P10.
v2: Microscopy images (AFM .tiff, MFM .gwy, SEM/TEM .tif) are assumed processed (Type 1) unless the paper, README, or Zenodo description explicitly states otherwise. This affects P01, P16, P18, P20.
v2: DFT outputs and Monte Carlo simulation results deposited for figure reproduction are treated as Type 1 (calculation results for figures, not raw instrument data). This affects P16.
v2: Preprint PDFs are used throughout because the published versions are copyrighted; published DOIs are retained in metadata.

v2: P09 (Graphene-CrSBr spintronics) data.zip was previously not extracted, so the dataset folder appeared empty. The zip is intact (218 MB on disk, 800 entries / 503 MB uncompressed, includes 23 .dat raw instrument files under '*/Raw data/'). Extracted in place to dataset/type2/extracted/ on 2026-04-11. P09 retained as Type2.

papers.title: Exceptional electronic transport and quantum oscillations in thin bismuth crystals grown inside van der Waals materials
papers.authors: Laisi Chen*, Amy X. Wu*, Naol Tulu, Joshua Wang, Adrian Juanson, Kenji Watanabe, Takashi Taniguchi, Michael T. Pettes, Marshall Campbell, Chaitanya A. Gadre, Yinong Zhou, Hangman Chen, Penghui Cao, Luis A. Jauregui, Ruqian Wu, Xiaoqing Pan, Javier D. Sanchez-Yamagishi (*co-first, per arXiv preprint)
papers.classification_reason: 91 files organized per figure. 75 CSVs: 68 with annotated headers (Temperature (K), Resistance (Ohm), B field (T)), 7 with numeric indices but still processed data for figure panels. 16 TIFF AFM images = processed microscopy (AFM images should be assumed processed unless stated otherwise). No 'raw' language in paper or Zenodo.
papers.notes: Published version: Nature Materials 2024 (10.1038/s41563-024-01894-0). arXiv preprint used for PDF — published version is copyrighted.
paper_data_statements: No data availability section in arXiv preprint.
Zenodo description mirrors abstract.
Full PDF reference list scan (refs 1-31) found no Zenodo citation in main text. Dataset 10929346 is not cited in the preprint; likely added at Nature Materials publication stage.

papers.title: Visualizing the atomic-scale origin of metallic behavior in Kondo insulators
papers.readme_summary: Data for reproducing all figures in Science 379, 1214-1218 (2023). Jupyter notebooks for each figure + raw STM data.
papers.classification_reason: Zenodo explicitly: 'raw data files and analysis steps.' README describes .3ds as 'simultaneously recorded dI/dV, I(V), and topography measurements.' All data in proprietary .3ds/.FL/.TFR/.npz binary formats. ipynb are scripts. 3× size: 468 MB >> 1 MB.
papers.notes: Kondo insulator SmB6 STM study. Notebooks reproduce paper figures. Large raw .3ds files skipped.
paper_data_statements: Paper: 'All data and analysis presented in this paper are deposited in Zenodo'
Zenodo: 'This dataset contains the raw data files and analysis steps'

papers.title: Terahertz photocurrent probe of quantum geometry and interactions in magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene
papers.classification_reason: 5 xlsx files per figure with annotated headers (Filling Factor, conductivity, Sigmaxxx). 0.4 MB. Zenodo: 'Data includes photocurrent and resistivity measurements.' 'raw data' in paper text refers to measurement display, not deposit.
papers.notes: Magic-angle TBG terahertz photocurrent. Perfect for replotting - each xlsx corresponds to one figure.
paper_data_statements: Zenodo: 'Data includes photocurrent and resistivity measurements'

papers.title: Direct visualization of electronic transport in a quantum anomalous Hall insulator

files.name: fig2/image_data.npz
sample_headers: SQUID flux and current density images

papers.readme_summary: Data organized by figure (main_text/fig1-fig4, extended_data/ed1-ed9). Transport data in txt with physical headers, SQUID imaging in npz.
papers.classification_reason: Zenodo: 'Source data for...' (not raw). 25 txt with annotated headers (Magnetic Field (T), Rxy (Ohm), sig_xx (h/e^2)) = Type 1. 12 npz binary SQUID imaging files = Type 2.
paper_data_statements: Zenodo: 'Source data for Direct visualization of electronic transport in a quantum anomalous Hall insulator'

papers.title: Distinct switching of chiral transport in the kagome metals KV3Sb5 and CsV3Sb5
papers.classification_reason: Proprietary Origin format (.opju/.oggu) requires Origin software. OriginalData.zip contains raw .dat. 85 MB >> replot estimate. Paper: 'Data that support the findings...will be deposited to Zenodo.'
papers.notes: Kagome metals chiral transport with quantum oscillation data in Origin format.
paper_data_statements: Paper: 'Data that support the findings of this study will be deposited to Zenodo'

papers.title: Direct observation of altermagnetic band splitting in CrSb thin films
papers.classification_reason: Paper explicitly: 'The raw data of the XRD and ARPES line graphs shown in this study have been deposited in the Zenodo database.' Paper text overrides file structure inference per classification rules.
papers.notes: First direct observation of altermagnetic band splitting. XRD + ARPES line profiles.
paper_data_statements: Paper: 'The raw data of the XRD and ARPES line graphs shown in this study have been deposited in the Zenodo database under accession code 10.5281/zenodo.10531915.'

papers.title: Charge density waves in infinite-layer NdNiO2 nickelates
papers.classification_reason: Paper: 'All the data supporting the findings...deposited in the Zenodo repository.' Annotated headers (energy, fluorescence-yield, H, intensity). Figure-organized (fig2-fig4 dirs). No 'raw' in paper text. 0.6 MB appropriate for replotting.
papers.notes: Nickelate CDW in NdNiO2. Resonant X-ray scattering data organized by figure panels (fig2a-p, fig3, fig4).
paper_data_statements: Paper: 'All the data supporting the findings of this study are available in the Supplementary Information and deposited in the Zenodo repository'

papers.title: Rotation of gap nodes in the topological superconductor Cux(PbSe)5(Bi2Se3)6
papers.classification_reason: README: 'data underlying all figures...in .csv or .txt file format. Furthermore, raw data files are provided.' raw_data/ subfolders = explicit Type 2 signal. 67 clean csv/txt = Type 1. .3ds/.sxm in raw_data/ = Type 2.
papers.notes: Topological superconductor gap node rotation. Raw data archived. Download may be partial.
paper_data_statements: Paper main text (found via text scan): 'in the generation of main and supplementary figures are available in Zenodo with the identifier 10.5281/zenodo.10684776.'
README: 'data underlying all figures of the paper...is given in .csv or .txt file format. Furthermore, raw data files are provided.'

papers.title: Electrostatically controlled spin polarization in Graphene-CrSBr magnetic proximity heterostructures
papers.zip_contents: 800 entries / 503 MB uncompressed. Contains: '180K field sweep/Raw data (180K)/data_*.dat' + .set instrument files, 'Rxx B model comparison/' analysis figures (.png/.svg/.eps), and Python plotting/processing scripts. Zip extracted in-place to dataset/type2/extracted/ to make contents browsable.
papers.classification_reason: Mixed deposit. Type 2 evidence: 23 raw .dat instrument files under '*/Raw data/' and '*/Raw data (180K)/' folders, Zenodo description explicitly mentions 'raw data', .set instrument config files alongside each .dat. Type 1 evidence: figure-organized analysis subfolders ('180K field sweep/pics/', 'Rxx B model comparison/vertical plots/...') containing the processed/plotted outputs that accompany the paper figures, plus the Python plotting scripts that turn the raw .dat files into those figures.
papers.notes: Graphene-CrSBr magnetic proximity heterostructure. Spintronics/QHE data + model. data.zip is intact (218 MB on disk, unzip -t passes); previously appeared 'empty' because nothing was extracted in dataset/type2/. Extracted on 2026-04-11 to dataset/type2/extracted/ for visibility. Reclassified Type1+Type2 because the deposit bundles both raw instrument files and the per-figure plotting scripts/outputs.
paper_data_statements: Zenodo: 'For raw data and symmetry analysis of quantum Hall effect field sweep data at 20K'
Zip contains folder named 'Raw data (180K)/'

papers.title: Conventional Superconductivity in the Doped Kagome Superconductor Cs(V0.86Ta0.14)3Sb5 from Vortex Lattice Studies
papers.classification_reason: Single xlsx with multi-sheet data per figure (Fig1b-Fig4b). Annotated physical headers (T(K), μ₀H(T), q(1E-2 nm^-1), B(T), |F(q)|(mT)). 0.02 MB. Directly replotable.
papers.notes: Kagome superconductor vortex lattice. SANS data with magnetic field, temperature, form factor measurements.
paper_data_statements: No data availability section in arXiv preprint.

Full PDF reference list scan (refs 1-72) found no figshare/Zenodo citation in main text. Dataset (figshare 25737993) is not cited in the preprint; likely added at Nature Communications publication stage.

paper_data_statements: Paper: 'All data contained in the figures will be available at zenodo.org upon publication.'

'Raw data' in paper is a figure subsection label, not deposit description.

papers.classification_reason: Paper: 'data supporting the findings are available in a Zenodo repository.' 40 .pkl pickle binary files requiring Python scripts to process into plots. README: 'The python script will generate the plots.' Binary format = Type 2. 59 MB.
paper_data_statements: Paper: 'The data supporting the findings are available in a Zenodo repository'
README: 'The python script will generate the plots shown in the manuscript.'

papers.title: Induced superconducting correlations in a quantum anomalous Hall insulator
papers.classification_reason: 61 CSVs with annotated headers (B(T), R_D(Ohm), Idc(A), V_D(V)) organized per figure (Fig1-4, FigS1-13). Zenodo says 'raw data files' but all files have labeled columns and are figure-organized = Type1 per definition. KWANT .ipynb = scripts (not data). No binary/instrument/unlabeled files exist.
paper_data_statements: Paper: 'Data availability: The data that support the findings of this study are available at the online depository figshare with the identifier **** and Supplementary Information.'
Zenodo: 'raw data files and KWANT simulation code used in the generation of the main and supplementary figures'
Note: 'raw data files' here means measurement CSVs with annotated headers, not unprocessed instrument data
Discrepancy: arXiv preprint states figshare (placeholder identifier ****); final data deposited on Zenodo (record 11231864) at publication time.

Paper data availability statement explicitly excludes raw files from the deposit, reinforcing Type1.

Zenodo: 'Data and code necessary to reproduce the figures in the main text and supplementary materials'

Zenodo: 'ARPES measurements of the band structure.' No 'raw' in text.
paper_data_statements: Zenodo: 'angle resolved photoemission spectroscopy measurements of the band structure...experimental data complemented with tight binding fits (eight bands).'
